requirements.check: A recorded verdict containing a forbidden future identifier or heldout gold-derived string must fail before a lesson is emitted.
The real parity planner must bind all four arm prompts to one exact token count and a content-addressed receipt.
The real evidence builder and readback verifier must accept grounded observations with provenance and no scientific verdict field.

negative_oracle.injection: Add a scientific verdict field after evidence construction, preserve the old evidence hash, and require the real readback verifier to reject it.
